title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 643.161 - State or political subdivisions contracting with persons not having a permit or in contempt of court prohibited
text:
643.161.  State or political subdivisions contracting with persons not having a permit or in contempt of court prohibited. — 1.  No officer, agency or department of the state government, or of any political subdivision of this state shall enter into a contract with any person required to apply for a permit under the provisions of sections 643.010 to 643.190 unless such person has applied for or received a permit or has been granted a variance therefor pursuant to sections 643.010 to 643.190.
  2.  No contract shall be entered into by any such governmental authority with any person who is in contempt of any court order enforcing the provisions of sections 643.010 to 643.190.
(L. 1972 H.B. 1184 § 203.160, A.L. 1992 S.B. 544)
